hero.badge: Eden Academy · Grade 1 · Codename: TWILIGHT's Daughter
hero.subtitle: Age 6. Eden Academy student. Loves peanuts.
hero.subtitleHighlight: and already knows every thought in your head.

about.subtitle: Target A's classified file. Handle with extreme care. Do not let her catch you reading this. She already knows.
about.trait0Desc: Can read minds at any time and uses it responsibly. (Does not use it responsibly at all.)
about.trait1Desc: Deep expertise in all peanut varieties. Will trade national secrets for snacks.
about.trait2Desc: Performs as an ordinary child every day. Oscar-worthy performance.
about.trait3Desc: Just wants the family to stay together. Don't tell anyone.
about.quote: Hey, Anya knows what you're thinking. You think Anya is just a small child. That's exactly what Anya wants you to think.
about.dangerNote: * Assessed by WISE analysts. Target is aware of this rating and is pleased.

skills.subtitle: All skills verified by WISE field agents. Results may vary. WISE is not responsible for peanut-related incidents.
skills.skill0Desc: Instantly accesses everyone's thoughts within range. No encryption can stop it. WISE tried.
skills.skill1Desc: Maintained a fake family identity for months without anyone suspecting. Even her parents don't know.
skills.skill2Desc: Uses 'big adorable eyes' power to escape any situation. 97% success rate.
skills.skill3Desc: Sixth sense for excitement, adventure, and espionage. Activates before mission brief ends.
skills.skill4Desc: Complete knowledge of all peanut varieties, preparation methods, and optimal contexts. This is a skill. Do not judge.
skills.skill5Desc: Passive skill. Normal situations within 10 meters are automatically converted into hilarious disasters.

quotes.subtitle: Collected from field reports, Eden Academy records, and extremely concerning WISE surveillance logs.
quotes.quote0Context: Said after reading someone's mind and discovering they also like peanuts.
quotes.quote1Context: Upon learning the school field trip might involve espionage.
quotes.quote2Text: Anya is not a child. Anya is a spy!
quotes.quote2Context: Both simultaneously true. Anya holds both truths at once.
quotes.quote3Context: Before nearly every mission. Success rate: statistically improbable, yet consistent.
quotes.quote4Context: Justification for eating peanuts instead of studying. Papa agreed just to make her stop.
quotes.quote5Text: Papa is the coolest in the world.
quotes.quote5Context: Anya is the only one who knows exactly how true this sentence is.
quotes.quote6Context: Determined to keep the fake family together forever.
quotes.quote7Context: Announced loudly. Study time unchanged. Peanut consumption increased significantly.
quotes.featuredQuote: No matter how dangerous Papa's mission is, Anya will always protect our family.
quotes.featuredNote: Inner thought. Top secret. Please disregard.

footer.tagline: Secret Esper · Eden Academy · WISE Adjacent
footer.telepathy: Telepathy Online — She knows you're here.
